assertions.text: Three components: Glossary, Full Rewrite, One-Sentence Summary
Every jargon term identified and translated

assertion_results.note: Terms identified: summary judgment, counterclaim, res judicata, cause of action, adjudicated, prior proceeding
Trade-off flagged: res judicata simplified but legal precision lost
Yield curve, inverted, 2-year Treasury, 10-year, basis points all translated
Trade-off noted: inversion signal simplified from probabilistic to directional
All three components; glossary includes EU-specific legal terms
All EU law jargon identified: ECJ, Article 34/36 TFEU, free movement, proportionality test, Cassis de Dijon
Trade-off flagged: proportionality test oversimplified for general reader; Cassis de Dijon significance reduced
